title: Dragon Fox hit forces opponent damage dice on own primary

card.rawText: When this creature hits, your opponent must roll 2 damage die against their primary creature.

plan.title: Dragon Fox hit forces opponent damage dice on own primary
plan.summary: Dragon Fox lands an attack, then opponent rolls 2 direct damage dice against their own primary creature with no modifier or critical rules.

notes: Set Dragon Fox as player_1 primary.
Set player_2 primary creature with AL low enough for hit to land and 50 HP.
Ensure not in first turn cycle so damage is allowed.

steps: Player 1 attacks player_2 primary with Dragon Fox.
Resolve hit and normal attack damage.
Resolve Dragon Fox ON_HIT forced damage dice effect.
Inspect player_2 primary HP and debug/effect log.

expectedAssertions.label: Opponent primary took forced dice damage

manualVerification: Confirm forced 2D6 damage did not add Dragon Fox modifier.
Confirm no critical hit or miss behavior applied to forced damage dice.
riskNotes: Runtime support is partial; trigger may fire without dedicated ROLL_DAMAGE_DICE resolver.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Check whether partial battle trigger actually applies forced damage.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
